home.title:

Nunes
home.description: Over 5 years building complete web applications, from front-end to back-end, focused on quality, security and scalability.

about.title: About
about.bio1: Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience in web development. I started as a Front-end developer and evolved into Full Stack responsibilities, participating in the construction and maintenance of complete applications.
about.bio2: I have experience in building responsive interfaces with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, API integration and creation, database modeling and optimization with ORMs like Drizzle and Prisma. I also work with JWT authentication, bcrypt encryption, dynamic PDF generation and containerization with Docker.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm available for new projects and opportunities. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.
